options.a: Vision remains our most important source of information, even if we receive conflicting data from other sources.
options.b: Information on orientation can only be acquired visually. Pilots should aim to get a good view of the horizon.
options.c: Perceptions of all senses have the same impact, which makes it difficult to manage sensory conflicts.
options.d: Visual information suddenly become useless and have to be actively disregarded.
